message:
chore(tests): Align test groups with CPython 3.13.1

Remove tests from groups that don't exist in CPython 3.13.1:
- annotationlib, apple, crossinterp (3.14+ features)
- nturl2path, tstring, xml_dom_xmlbuilder, zstd (not in 3.13)
- remote_pdb (not in upstream)
